content.description: Replaced hardcoded /workspace/nexus-mk2/domain paths with $NEXUS_DOMAIN_PATH in audit-loop.sh (lines 37 and 50), auditor.md (Steps 1, 2, and 3), and builder-mk1.md (Step 3). All references to the domain path now read from the NEXUS_DOMAIN_PATH environment variable per the NexusEnvironment contract.
